series_metadata.series_title: Video Lottery Sales Agent non-Gaming Employee - Security Files (Racetrack)
series_metadata.series_description: File contains records related to Video Lottery Non-Gaming Employee Applications and other Video Lottery Employee licensing related information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in a secure area with access limited to persons who need these records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, for two (2) years, review for administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Shred
